visual_description: Three individuals are visible in a small boat at night, with one standing at the stern and two seated, all dressed in dark clothing; the boat is illuminated against a dark water surface with distant lights on the horizon. A man in a suit is seen in profile, holding a phone to his ear, with blurred figures and dim lighting in the background suggesting an indoor or semi-indoor setting. The standing person in the boat faces forward, while the seated individuals appear to be looking ahead or slightly downward, with minimal visible gestures or facial expressions.
audio_description: The audio features a male voice speaking in a high-pitched, fast-paced manner, with a noticeable gasp.
